message:
🐛 Fix solution import: support nested KB format, add lenient defaults and GA4 error tracking (#2842)

The validator rejected all console-kb missions because they use a nested
format ({ mission: { title, steps, ... } }) while the validator expected
flat top-level fields. Users saw 4 validation errors on every import.

Fixes:
- Add normalizeMissionData() to unwrap the nested `mission` wrapper
  that console-kb uses, merging it with top-level metadata
- Default missing optional fields instead of erroring:
  - tags → empty array
  - description → empty string
  - type → 'custom' if unrecognized
  - version → 'kc-mission-v1'
  - step.title → 'Step N' if missing
  - title → derived from name field if title is missing
- Only hard-fail on truly fatal issues (no title/name, no steps)
- Add ksc_solution_import_error GA4 event with error count and first
  error message for tracking import failure rates

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
